objective: Unblock and gate file read/write for opencodex Cursor upstream: WP1 enable provider.unsafeAllowNativeLocalExec live via management API + A/B verify read/write through a cursor-routed model; WP2 repo patch deriving native-exec allowance from the Codex request's declared sandbox mode (danger-full-access) with the provider flag as override, plus tests; devlog unit devlog/260711_cursor_native_exec/.

workPhases.title: Enable native local exec on providers.cursor live + A/B verify read/write

tasks.title: Devlog unit 000 plan doc (root cause + WP map)
Baseline A: cursor-routed model read of temp file returns NATIVE_LOCAL_EXEC_DISABLED denial
Flip flag via POST /api/providers (in-memory + saved, no restart)
After B: same read returns real content; write creates file on disk

workPhases.title: Repo patch: sandbox-mode-derived native-exec allowance (provider flag stays override) + tests

tasks.title: P: diff-level plan doc 010 (detection point, plumbing path, test map)
A: sol reviewer audit of plan
B: implement detection + plumbing + provider override precedence
C: targeted bun tests incl. activation test + tsc typecheck

criteria.scenario: Live cursor-routed request asked to read a known temp file, with providers.cursor.unsafeAllowNativeLocalExec enabled at runtime without proxy restart
criteria.expectedEvidence: curl output pair: BEFORE shows NATIVE_LOCAL_EXEC_DISABLED denial, AFTER shows the real file content
criteria.capturedEvidence: BEFORE: /tmp/ocx-ab-before.json model relayed NATIVE_LOCAL_EXEC_DISABLED denial. AFTER: /tmp/ocx-ab-after-read.json exact content OCX-NATIVE-EXEC-TEST-2607111905; debug frame exec:readArgs seq21/83/143 (/api/debug/logs). Flip: POST /api/providers success, config diff only unsafeAllowNativeLocalExec. Doc: devlog/260711_cursor_native_exec/001_wp1_evidence.md

criteria.scenario: Live cursor-routed request asked to write a file (no apply_patch advertised)
criteria.expectedEvidence: file exists on disk with expected content after the request; cat output captured
criteria.capturedEvidence: /tmp/ocx-native-exec-write-test.txt created with exact line OCX-WRITE-OK-2607111920 (ls+cat captured); debug frame exec:writeArgs seq145; model DONE. Doc: 001_wp1_evidence.md

criteria.scenario: Codex request carrying 'sandbox_mode is danger-full-access' permissions text routes to cursor adapter WITHOUT the provider flag set
criteria.expectedEvidence: unit test proving detection flips policy to allow (activation evidence), plus default/read-only request still denied; bun test output
criteria.capturedEvidence: tests/cursor-native-exec-policy.test.ts: 18 pass / 0 fail (activation twin: real fs read allowed under codex-sandbox+declared, NATIVE_LOCAL_EXEC_DISABLED denial when undeclared; runTurn->factory capture true/false). Commit 26cf884. Doc: devlog/260711_cursor_native_exec/011_wp2_evidence.md

criteria.expectedEvidence: targeted bun test suites pass + typecheck (tsc --noEmit) exit 0; outputs captured; user's dirty claude-inbound files untouched (git status unchanged for them)
criteria.capturedEvidence: Adjacent cursor suites 51 pass / 0 fail; bunx tsc --noEmit exit 0; C-gate fresh sol reviewer Aquinas rounds FAIL->FAIL->PASS (security wording corrected; executable hunks unchanged); scope clean per reviewer finding 6 (exactly the 7 owned files); other sessions files untouched (their work committed separately 12e82239).
